subject: Statistics
title: Quantile Regression
description: A short lesson to help you apply Quantile Regression.

hook.text: Standard regression predicts the average. But what if you want to predict the worst case?

buildup.text: Quantile regression predicts any percentile — the median, the 10th percentile, or the 90th.

discovery.text: It reveals how the entire distribution of Y changes with X, not just the center.

twist.text: Exercise might raise average lifespan by 2 years but cut the risk of early death by 10 years. Different quantiles.

climax.text: Finance uses it for risk: what's the worst 5% outcome? That matters more than the average.

punchline.text: Don't just predict the average. Predict the extremes.

quiz.question: What does quantile regression predict that standard regression cannot?
options: Any percentile of the outcome distribution — not just the mean
The exact future value with certainty
Whether two variables are causally related
